rule_1_trailing_push.name: Fresh Attacking Substitution When Trailing Late
rule_1_trailing_push.description: Introduce offensive substitutes to push for equalizer when trailing late in match
rule_1_trailing_push.rationale: Trailing late in match - fresh attacking players needed to create chances

rule_2_protect_lead.name: Defensive Substitution When Leading Late
rule_2_protect_lead.description: Consider defensive substitution to protect lead late in match
rule_2_protect_lead.rationale: Leading late - defensive stability is priority

rule_3_refresh_midgame.name: Optimal Time for Tactical Substitution
rule_3_refresh_midgame.description: Refresh key players before fatigue affects performance
rule_3_refresh_midgame.action: Refresh key players with fresh legs
rule_3_refresh_midgame.rationale: Optimal time for tactical substitutions (~65 mins)
